description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

Structured historical blockchain data across 100+ chains via REST. Resource families include Balances (native, ERC20, ERC721, ERC1155, historical portfolios, token holders), Transactions (v3 paginated, time-bucketed, by-block), NFTs, Base service (blocks, logs, gas prices, address resolution), Cross-Chain Activity, Pricing, and Security (token approvals).
